title: Use Transactions
text: Use Transactions Determines whether the use of transactions is enabled for the component when run in a distributed transaction processing environment. Valid values are True or False (default). Value Description False Use of transactions is disabled. True Use of transactions is enabled. To determine how transactions are applied, set the Transaction Type . For more information, see Transaction Type . Description In a distributed transaction environment, the client can start a transaction, and one or more services started by the client can participate in the transaction. When an operation that is located on a server is called, the server switches the DBMS to this transaction, so the service works on a transaction that is already started. Applies To Signature Implementation Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
